title: aegilops triuncialis subvar. subglabra
intro: Aegilops triuncialis subvar. subglabra, also known as smooth brome, is a type of grass native to Eurasia and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aegilops triuncialis subvar. subglabra include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
